title: Pest Control Workers
description: Apply or release chemical solutions or toxic gases and set traps to kill or remove pests and vermin that infest buildings and surrounding areas.

tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect premises to identify infestation source and extent of damage to property, wall, or roof porosity and access to infested locations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Recommend treatment and prevention methods for pest problems to clients.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Spray or dust chemical solutions, powders, or gases into rooms, onto clothing, furnishings, or wood, or over marshlands, ditches, or catch basins.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean work site after completion of job.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Drive truck equipped with power spraying equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure area dimensions requiring treatment, calculate fumigant requirements, and estimate cost for service.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Study preliminary reports or diagrams of infested area and determine treatment type required to eliminate and prevent recurrence of infestation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct, or assist other workers in, treatment or extermination processes to eliminate or control rodents, insects, or weeds.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Post warning signs and lock building doors to secure area to be fumigated.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set mechanical traps, or place poisonous paste or bait in sewers, burrows, or ditches.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cut or bore openings in building or surrounding concrete, access infested areas, insert nozzle, and inject pesticide to impregnate ground.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean and remove blockages from infested areas to facilitate spraying procedures and provide drainage, using brooms, mops, shovels, or rakes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
